clean_html:
Home Markets Tech

Markets close mixed as tech leads

Wall Street ended Friday with mixed signals as technology shares rallied while energy retreated on softer crude prices.

The S&P 500 rose 0.3% while the Dow slipped 0.1%. Bond yields were little changed.

Tech leads the tape

Shares of several large-cap technology names gained on reports of stronger enterprise AI spending. Analysts at Research Co raised price targets on three of the five names.

  • Alpha Corp +2.1%
  • Beta Systems +1.7%
  • Gamma Cloud +3.4%

Energy softens

Crude fell 1.2% on the session, pressuring integrated oil majors.

Additional reporting by the newsroom staff.

Share on X Share on Facebook

html_to_markdown:
html
Markets close mixed as tech leads — Example News
[Home](/)
[Markets](/markets)
[Tech](/tech)

# Markets close mixed as tech leads

Wall Street ended Friday with mixed signals as technology
    shares rallied while energy retreated on softer crude prices.

The **S&P 500** rose 0.3% while the **Dow** slipped 0.1%. Bond yields were little changed.

## Tech leads the tape

Shares of several large-cap technology names gained on reports of stronger
    enterprise AI spending. Analysts at [Research Co](/companies/research) raised price targets on three of the five names.

- Alpha Corp +2.1%
- Beta Systems +1.7%
- Gamma Cloud +3.4%

## Energy softens

Crude fell 1.2% on the session, pressuring integrated oil majors.

![A stock ticker display.](/img/markets.jpg)

Additional reporting by the newsroom staff.

[Share on Facebook](?share=fb)
